body.title: [sprint] Consequence check: granny tier cascade + exact-match
body.intention: I intend that the cascade and exact-match changes produce no silent mis-routing regressions.
body.description:
**What changed:** Granny dispatch gained cascade_if_idle + exact_match flags.
**Predicted unintended effects:** cascade could starve builder-tier devices of work if CC.0 always absorbs first; exact-match could silently strand tickets with no matching device.
**Signals to watch:** builder-role tickets sitting in sprint queue while CC is idle (cascade starvation); sprint queue accumulating unrouted tickets (exact-match stranding).
**Gate condition:** Check by 2026-06-24.
**Affected files:** None — observation only
**Scope boundary:** Observe routing behavior; annotate clean/starved/stranded
**Test plan:** no tests — observation ticket
